intentAndPurpose.intent: Interactive selection / filter pill. Three surface-resolved variants (bold / subtle / ghost) inheritable from a parent <ChipGroup>. `attention` is the Figma alias (highâ†’bold, mediumâ†’subtle, lowâ†’ghost). Selectable (toggle) with optional start/end slots. appearance="auto" â†’ secondary; pill-shaped.

props.name: children
props.description: Label content. String children become the accessible name.

props.name: variant
props.description: Surface-resolved paint. Inherited from <ChipGroup>; per-chip prop wins.

props.name: attention
props.description: Figma alias â†’ variant (highâ†’bold, mediumâ†’subtle, lowâ†’ghost). Used when `variant` is unset; default low â†’ ghost.

props.name: appearance
props.description: Multi-accent role, resolved against the parent <Surface>. Inherited from <ChipGroup>. Explicit prop wins; unset/'auto' resolves to secondary (or the nearest <Surface appearance>).

props.name: onSelectedChange
props.description: Fires with the next selected value on press.

props.name: value
props.description: Identifier read by <ChipGroup> for selection mapping.

props.name: end
props.description: Trailing slot â€” Icon (e.g. a dismiss affordance).

props.name: aria-label
props.description: Recommended when children is not a plain string.

props.name: backgroundColor
props.description: [error] Don't paint directly. Use `appearance` (role) + `variant`/`mode` and wrap in <Surface mode>; the brand cascade picks the right fill.

props.name: style
props.description: Layout style only. variant + appearance + parent <Surface> drive the fill. â€” [warn] Chip colour is surface-resolved from `variant` + `appearance`. Don't set backgroundColor / borderColor.
